# `toPointer`

**Systems:** PX86, M1ARM  
**Parameters:** `i,i`

---

<div markdown="0" class="trse-help-body">

<h3>pointer = ToPointer( [ hi byte ], [ lo byte ] );</h3>
<ul>
    <li>[  hi byte ] - high byte of address. Example: "$04" is the high byte of the screen address $0400.</li>
    <li>[  lo byte ] - low byte of address. Example: "$00" is the low byte of the screen address $0400.</li>
</ul>


<h3>Description</h3>
<p>Creates a pointer of two bytes.</p>


<h3>Example</h3>

<code>
var
    bankAdd:byte=$40;
    zp: pointer;
begin
        // zp points to some bank 0 screen position
        zp:=$0440;

        // zp points to the same screen position in bank 1
        zp:=ToPointer( hi(zp) + bankAdd, lo(zp) );


end;
</code>


</div>
